g.text: 0x000 | uint32_t[8] | H[8] // running hash state (256 bits)
0x020 | uint8_t[64] | buf[64] // partial block buffer (512 bits)
0x060 | uint64_t | total_bits // input bits seen so far
0x068 | size_t | buf_len // valid bytes in buf [0..63]
Total: 112 bytes on stack — no heap allocation
buf contents stale; buf_len=0 is canonical
Green | State: INITIALIZED — H loaded, counters zeroed
Blue | State: UPDATING — bytes accumulating in buffer
Red | HOT PATH — compression triggered at 64-byte boundary
Purple | State: FINALIZING — padding + length field applied
Orange | BOUNDARY CASE — 56-byte input forces 2-block padding
Gray | State: DONE — digest emitted, context stale
